title: FOUNDATION SECURITY BULLETIN: FUGITIVE ALERT
subtitle: RYU HUNTER -- CONSIDERED ARMED AND EXTREMELY DANGEROUS
author: Foundation Internal Security Division
summary: Widely circulated fugitive bulletin. All personnel are required to review.
body:
All personnel are required to review this bulletin in full.

**SUBJECT:** Ryu Hunter

**FORMER POSITION:** Site Director, APD-14 (Anomalous Properties Database)

**STATUS:** At large. Whereabouts unknown since 2026-06-18.

### Charges

Ryu Hunter is wanted in connection with the following, arising from the loss of APD-14 on 2026-06-18:

- Unauthorized activation of a facility self-destruct protocol, resulting in the total loss of APD-14's central systems core.
- The deaths of three sitting Overseer Council members present at APD-14 at the time of the incident.
- Destruction of Foundation-licensed proprietary technology.

### Assessment

Hunter holds detailed working knowledge of APD's proprietary containment-monitoring systems and is believed to retain access to decentralized backups of that technology. Hunter should be considered a serious risk to any Foundation facility making use of APD-derived infrastructure, which, as of this filing, includes a majority of active Sites.

### Instructions

Do not approach. Do not attempt to engage or detain. If Hunter is sighted, secure the immediate area, restrict all APD-derived system access at that location, and contact Internal Security immediately through standard emergency channels.

This bulletin will be updated as new information becomes available.
